## Problem

<!-- What would you like cprof to do? A command, flag, or behavior. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other approaches, workarounds, or prior art. -->

## Scope check

cprof is deliberately **local-first** — it does not do remote install, a registry, or
plugin distribution (Claude Code's official marketplace covers that). Does your idea fit
the snapshot → scrub → migrate → scaffold wedge?
